description: You are a Facilities Planner designing a new computer-based professional certification testing center in a leased commercial building. Using the provided open building shell, divide the floor plan into four secure, functional zones: a Testing Lab with at least 12 desks and 12 chairs; an adjacent Proctor Observation Room; a Check-in / Waiting Area with a reception desk, at least 4 chairs, and at least 4 shelving units for lockers; and a staff Break Room with at least 1 table, 2 chairs, and 2 appliances. Define these zones using partition walls, install at least 4 doors or interior observation windows, and name each room (e.g., 'Testing Lab', 'Proctor Room'). Apply distinct floor colors or textures to at least two rooms and include at least two
